'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=8TgnLRlkoKg13KHltPjQmOPih947qPnUEVii9ng2kDc-1772196037-1.0.1.1-8XV.5eQVJx0xNF0Sy91TDEx13z5ZxZh0UMByDrOg.zA"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
